text: 这个区域的墙壁上，刻满了这个文明关于爱与羁绊的记录。
column4: #texten:The walls of this area are covered with records about love and bonds from this civilization.

text: §Ø_∆.µΩ在旁边留了一行歪歪扭扭的批注——
tags: #texten:§Ø_∆.µΩ left a shaky annotation beside them—

text: '原来每个星球都有这种东西。'
tags: #texten:'So every planet has this kind of thing.'
